# Options Strategies

> A free, interactive educational guide for learning how options trading strategies work.
> Not a trading tool — designed purely to help beginners understand options concepts.

This site explains options strategies in plain English with live stock prices and interactive
payoff diagrams. Adjust sliders to see real-dollar examples for any stock in real time.

## Strategies covered

- **Long Call** — Bet a stock will rise. Pay a premium for the right to buy at a set strike price. Limited risk, unlimited upside.
- **Long Put** — Bet a stock will fall. Pay a premium for the right to sell at a set strike price. Often used as portfolio insurance.
- **Covered Call** — Already own the stock? Sell a call to collect premium income, capping your upside in exchange.
- **Bull Call Spread** — Buy a call at a lower strike, sell one at a higher strike. Reduces cost vs. a naked long call; caps max profit.

## How the site works

Each strategy page shows:
1. A plain-English explanation
2. A step-by-step walkthrough using live stock prices and user-selected parameters
3. Key numbers: break-even price, max profit, max loss
4. A payoff-at-expiration chart

Stock prices are fetched live via yfinance. Parameters (strike, premium) are controlled by sliders
and all values update in real time.

## Content

- [Options Strategies — Home](https://options.veederville.com): All strategies, interactive examples, live prices
